claims.text: Pure-image document. Digital photo-composite/render: a saucer-shaped craft with a brilliant white halo above a grassy field with tree line, daylight scene. No text on page. Source: native Claude vision read of 2024-04-30-composite-sketch.pdf. This is the FBI September 2023 sighting witness recreation, depicting the cigar/linear/saucer-shaped object described in Serial 3/4/5 witness statements.
